import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut a_val = 0
  mut b_val = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    else
      if in_num
        if idx == 0
          a_val = cur
        else
          b_val = cur
        end
        idx = idx + 1
        cur = 0
        in_num = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if idx == 0
      a_val = cur
    else
      b_val = cur
    end
  end

  mut x = a_val
  mut y = b_val
  while y != 0
    let t = x % y
    x = y
    y = t
  end
  println("gcd=#{x}")
end
